title: Ctenardisia ovandensis

The genus Ctenardisia is a part of this family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This genus is a type of shrub or small tree that produces small white flowers. Further classification of Ctenardisia ovandensis may involve its order, family, and kingdom within the plant kingdom.
